name: Snapper De Vera Cruz
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle lime juice over the fish.
2. In a large skillet, mix the salsa and tomato paste.
3. Place the fish in a single layer in the sauce.
4. Cover and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
5. Remove the fish.
6. Add olives to the sauce and boil for 2-3 minutes to thicken.
7. Pour over the fish and serve.
151 calories per serving.
